choices.text: Hash Time-Locked Contract: "pay X if recipient reveals preimage of hash H before time T; refund otherwise." Chains across hops; atomic guarantee — either all hops complete or all refund. Cryptographic, trustless.

Onion routing (like Tor). Sender encrypts route in nested layers; each hop decrypts only its layer; knows previous + next hop only. Recipient sees nothing about sender. Channels publicly known via gossip but payment direction hidden.

questions.explanation: Onion routing hides hops from each other.
